hypothesis: Augmenting the LLM agent with a learned kinetics surrogate that predicts composition- and temperature-dependent JMA rate parameters (Ea and k0) for Nb–O phase transformations and exposing this surrogate as a callable tool will increase the LLM’s success rate on multi-phase synthesis challenges (Challenges 2 and 3) by at least 50% and reduce the mean scaled phase-fraction error by at least 30% compared to the baseline LLM+CALPHAD simulator that uses a fixed Ea and k0.
